title: AblationDefinition
description: Ablation study definition stored at .mcp-client-data/ablations/{name}.yaml. Defines experiment phases, models, and execution settings.

dryRun.description: When true, executes @tool-exec commands directly without LLM involvement

runs.description: Number of times to repeat each phase/model combination

arguments.description: User-supplied arguments resolved before execution. Referenced as ${argName} in commands.

models.description: Models to test across all phases

tools.description: Top-level tool filter — applies to all phases. Phase-level tools: blocks are merged (deny is additive, allow is intersected).

hooks.description: Global hooks that apply across all phases

systemPrompt.description: Master system prompt — all phases inherit unless overridden. Sent via each provider's native system prompt mechanism. Supports @insert-prompt:server__promptName(arg='val') and @insert-resource:server__templateName(param='val') syntax.

escalation.description: When true, models form an ordered escalation chain. On phase failure (@escalate), the runner switches to the next model and re-runs the same phase with clean context. On success, resets to model[0] for the next phase. If all models are exhausted, the run is aborted.

name.description: Argument name, referenced as ${name} in commands

description.description: Prompt shown when requesting this argument

type.description: Argument type. 'attachment' resolves to a file path.

name.description: Phase name used in results and logs

enabled.description: Set to false to skip this phase without removing it from the definition

commands.description: Ordered commands: @tool-exec:server__tool(args), @tool:server__tool(args), @insert-prompt:server__promptName(arg='val'), @insert-resource:server__resourceName, @insert-resource:server__templateName(param='val'), @insert-attachment:filename, @clear-attachments, @wait:N, @complete-phase, @escalate, @abort, or plain text (user prompt to LLM)

onStart.description: Commands to run when this phase starts. Supports the same directives as commands (@tool-exec, @insert-resource, @insert-prompt, etc.).

onEnd.description: Commands to run when this phase ends. Supports the same directives as commands (@tool-exec, @insert-resource, @insert-prompt, etc.).

systemPrompt.description: Per-phase system prompt override — replaces master systemPrompt for this phase. Supports @insert-prompt:server__promptName(arg='val') and @insert-resource:server__templateName(param='val') syntax.

userPrompt.description: User prompt injected as a user message at phase start, before commands run. Supports @insert-prompt:server__promptName(arg='val') and @insert-resource:server__templateName(param='val') syntax.

tools.description: Per-phase tool filter. Merged with top-level: deny is additive (union), allow is intersected. Deny always wins over allow.

provider.description: Provider name (anthropic, openai, google, ollama, xai)

thinking.description: Thinking level. Omit to use provider default for reasoning models. Set 'off' to explicitly disable. Anthropic: adaptive|small|medium|large. OpenAI: none|low|medium|high. Google: minimal|dynamic|generous. xAI: low|high. Ollama: on.

maxIterations.description: Max agent iterations per phase. -1 for unlimited.

mcpTimeout.description: MCP tool timeout in seconds. Overrides system setting during ablation.

maxIpcCalls.description: Max IPC calls per phase. Overrides system setting during ablation.

mcpConfigPath.description: Override MCP config path for this ablation

clearContextBetweenPhases.description: When true (default), clears conversation context between phases. When false, conversation carries over across phases for the same model.

resetOutputsBetweenPhases.description: Output subdirectories to clear between phases. Files in these folders are captured per-phase but not carried forward.

run.description: Tool-exec command to evaluate as gate condition

whenOutput.description: Condition on the gate tool's output. If matched, onPass commands run; otherwise onFail.

onPass.description: Commands to run if gate condition passes

onFail.description: Commands to run if gate condition fails

prompt.description: Client prompt injected after gate commands execute (as system role on supported providers)

AblationToolFilter.description: Tool visibility filter. Allow = whitelist (only matching tools visible). Deny = blacklist (matching tools hidden). Deny always wins. Patterns support * glob (e.g. ros-mcp-server__* matches all tools from that server).

allow.description: Glob patterns — only matching tools are visible to the agent. If absent, all globally-enabled tools are allowed.

deny.description: Glob patterns — matching tools are hidden from the agent regardless of allow.

after.description: Tool name to match after execution

before.description: Tool name to match before execution

whenInput.description: Condition match on tool input arguments only. Use "*" as a wildcard value to match any value (key must be present).

whenOutput.description: Condition match on tool output JSON only. Use "*" as a wildcard value to match any value (key must be present).

run.description: Command to execute (ignored when gate is present)

gate.description: Conditional gate: evaluate tool, branch on pass/fail. When present, run is ignored.

prompt.description: Client prompt injected after hook execution (as system role on supported providers)
